creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 158061
Updated patch

Here's an updated patch that doesn't have mercurial or git in the build deps. They aren't necessary since we have ports grab all the deps and put them in place. Likewise, there's no need to 'go get' since we have the deps. We just need to build/install. I also made some other cleanups. If this looks OK to you, I'll commit it.
